family_definitions.low_mfe_stopout: stop exit with max favorable excursion below +1%
family_definitions.failed_followthrough: at least two day-0/day-1 weak follow-through flags and MFE below +3%
family_definitions.sector_relative_breakdown: stock underperformed sector by >=2pp while sector underperformed SPY by >=2pp
family_definitions.giveback_after_mfe: losing non-target trade after reaching at least +5% MFE

old_thin.regime: older mixed tape with lower win rate

future_test_candidates.why: Repeated across windows with limited observed winner collateral.
future_test_candidates.next_test_shape: shadow replay with an orthogonal event/state discriminator, not a direct filter

interpretation.oracle_note: Oracle dollars are an upper bound: they assume perfect identification before the exit path is known.
interpretation.llm_news_context: This audit did not use LLM/news context; future tests should only add it as an orthogonal event/state discriminator.
interpretation.do_not_promote_directly: No family here should be converted directly into a filter without a separate replay and collateral check.
